title: Trusted Publisher PyPI OIDC publish
description: Track the first trusted publisher PyPI OIDC workflow run for llm-sanitizer.

items.title: Wait for GitHub Actions publish.yml to run
items.description: Monitor https://github.com/Warnes-Innovations/llm-sanitizer/actions for the publish.yml workflow triggered by the v0.1.0 release. Confirm it completes successfully and PyPI project is created.

items.title: Verify PyPI project creation and release
items.description: Visit https://pypi.org/project/llm-sanitizer/ and confirm v0.1.0 is published and visible. Optionally pip install and run llm-sanitize --help.
